'''Jack Sinfield''' (born 21 September 2004) is an English [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|so}} for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].

==Playing career==
===Leeds Rhinos===
In 2021, Sinfield joined Leeds' first team from their academy and was included in their match day squad for a pre-season fixture against [[Wakefield Trinity]] on [[Boxing Day]].<ref>{{cite web |last=Smith |first=Peter |url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/familiar-name-returns-as-rhinos-confirm-boxing-day-squad-3500525 |title=Leeds Rhinos: Teenager Jack Sinfield named in strong squad for Boxing Day showdown with Wakefield Trinity |date=20 December 2021 |access-date=13 October 2022 |work=[[Yorkshire Evening Post]]}}</ref> In April 2022, he made his professional debut for Leeds against [[Castleford Tigers]],<ref name="Debut">{{cite web |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/61141907 |title=Castleford Tigers 16-14 Leeds Rhinos - Jack Sinfield handed Super League debut in defeat |date=18 April 2022 |access-date=13 October 2022 |work=[[BBC Sport]]}}</ref> his first appearance coinciding with that of another 17 year old, [[Max Simpson]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12196/12593827/jack-sinfield-leeds-rhinos-teenager-and-son-of-club-great-kevin-confesses-to-debut-nerves |title=Jack Sinfield: Leeds Rhinos teenager and son of club great Kevin confesses to debut nerves |date=18 April 2022 |access-date=13 October 2022 |work=[[Sky Sports]]}}</ref>

On 21 October 2025 it was announced that he had been released by [[Leeds Rhinos]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=21 October 2025|author=Stephen Ibbetson|title=Jack Sinfield released by Leeds Rhinos|url=https://www.totalrl.com/jack-sinfield-released-by-leeds-rhinos/}}</ref>

On 30 October 2025, [[Wakefield Trinity]] announced that they had signed Sinfield on the three-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://wakefieldtrinity.com/sinfield-joins-the-trin/ |title=Sinfield Joins The Trin! |website=Wakefield Trinity |date=30 October 2025 |access-date=31 October 2025}}</ref>

==Personal life==
His father is the former Leeds captain Sir [[Kevin Sinfield]].<ref name="Debut"/>
